subcodes.first_line: O thou candle of the love of God! Thy detailed letter was received and it brought the utmost happiness. It was a brilliant proof
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع محبت الله نامه مفصل شما رسید و بینهایت سبب سرور گشت زیرا بر ثبوت و
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation, @being a source of light; guidance, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
